description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) operating in autonomous mode was stopped for a red traffic light on north-westbound 9th Street, waiting to turn 
left onto Howard Street in San Francisco. After the light turned green, and before the Zoox vehicle started to move, it was rear ended by a 
passenger car (Vehicle 2) that was traveling directly behind. The Zoox vehicle operator then disengaged from autonomy, completed the left 
turn, and pulled over on Howard Street to exchange information. The Zoox vehicle sustained minor damage to the rear bumper. There were 
no reported injuries, and police were not called. The Zoox vehicle camera footage shows that the Vehicle 2 driver was not looking ahead at 
the roadway before or at the time of contact.
Print
Clear Form
